meaning: middling; average; impartial; (Hong Kong) secondary school that uses C
sentence: 他这次考试成绩中中，不好也不差。
pinyin: Tā zhè cì kǎo shì chéng jì zhōng zhōng, bù hǎo yě bù chà.
english: His exam results this time were middling — not great, not bad either.

sentence: 所有与会人员请准时到场。
pinyin: Suǒyǒu yù huì rényuán qǐng zhǔnshí dào chǎng.
english: All participants in the meeting please arrive on time.

meaning: 1. to push (for acceptance of a plan); 2. to push forward; 3. to promo
sentence: 这项政策推动了经济发展。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng zhèngcè tuīdòng le jīngjì fāzhǎn.
english: This policy has promoted economic development.

meaning: many years; for many years; longstanding
sentence: 他们多年没见，一见面就聊个不停。
pinyin: Tā men duō nián méi jiàn, yī jiàn miàn jiù liáo ge bù tíng.
english: They hadn't seen each other for many years and couldn't stop talking once they met.

sentence: 这部影片上映第一天就卖出了很多票。
pinyin: Zhè bù yǐngpiàn shàngyìng dì yī tiān jiù màichūle hěn duō piào.
english: This movie sold a lot of tickets on its very first day of release.
